positive.prompt: How do I install a local preview version of the .NET SDK?
Create a global.json file to lock our .NET SDK version locally
Write a script to install .NET SDK preview workloads on my local machine

evals.prompt: Create a global.json file specifying a .NET SDK version and configure a local preview SDK environment.
evals.expected_output: global.json locks SDK version locally without affecting systems global configuration.
expectations: A global.json file is correctly formatted in JSON
The target SDK version is locked
Environment path routing is checked or configured
System-wide installations are protected from changes
